1.title: ALB number of active connections
1.query:
timeseries active = avg(dt.cloud.aws.alb.connections.active, rollup: avg),
  by: { dt.entity.aws_application_load_balancer }
| fieldsAdd aws_application_load_balancer_name = entityName(dt.entity.aws_application_load_balancer)
| sort arrayAvg(active) desc
| limit 10

2.title: ALB number of new connections
2.query:
timeseries new = avg(dt.cloud.aws.alb.connections.new, rollup: avg),
  by: { dt.entity.aws_application_load_balancer }
| fieldsAdd aws_application_load_balancer_name = entityName(dt.entity.aws_application_load_balancer)
| sort arrayAvg(new) desc
| limit 10

3.title: ALB number of 4XX errors
3.query:
timeseries http4xx = avg(dt.cloud.aws.alb.errors.alb.http4xx, rollup: avg),
  by: { dt.entity.aws_application_load_balancer }
| fieldsAdd aws_application_load_balancer_name = entityName(dt.entity.aws_application_load_balancer)
| sort arrayAvg(http4xx) desc
| limit 10

4.title: ALB number of 5XX errors
4.query:
timeseries http5xx = avg(dt.cloud.aws.alb.errors.alb.http5xx, rollup: avg),
  by: { dt.entity.aws_application_load_balancer }
| fieldsAdd aws_application_load_balancer_name = entityName(dt.entity.aws_application_load_balancer)
| sort arrayAvg(http5xx) desc
| limit 10

6.title: ALB number of 4XX target errors
6.query:

  by: { dt.entity.aws_application_load_balancer }
| fieldsAdd aws_application_load_balancer_name = entityName(dt.entity.aws_application_load_balancer)
| sort arrayAvg(http4xx) desc
| limit 10

8.query:

  by: { dt.entity.aws_application_load_balancer }
| fieldsAdd aws_application_load_balancer_name = entityName(dt.entity.aws_application_load_balancer)
| sort arrayAvg(tls_neg) desc
| limit 10

9.title: ALB number of processed bytes
9.query:
timeseries bytes = avg(dt.cloud.aws.alb.bytes, rollup: avg),
  by: { dt.entity.aws_application_load_balancer }
| fieldsAdd aws_application_load_balancer_name = entityName(dt.entity.aws_application_load_balancer)
| sort arrayAvg(bytes) desc
| limit 10

10.title: ALB number of consumed LCUs
10.query:
timeseries lcus = avg(dt.cloud.aws.alb.lcus, rollup: avg),

| fieldsAdd aws_application_load_balancer_name = entityName(dt.entity.aws_application_load_balancer)
